name: Bug report
about: Report a symptom with a repro. The fix is decided in the PR, not here.
title: ""
labels: bug
---

## Symptom

<!-- What goes wrong, observed not theorized. Error text / wrong output / crash. -->

## Repro

<!-- Minimal steps to trigger it. Which install path (ServiceBay stack vs.
     standalone Hermes plugin), which pod/skill/image, what input. -->

## Starting-point files

<!-- Where a solver should start looking, e.g.
     voice-gatekeeper/src/gatekeeper/handler.py, templates/solbay/template.yml -->

## Impact (optional)

<!-- Who/what is affected and how badly. -->
